column1: CABIN QUALITY AUDIT — Scoring Math Reference
Area Weights: LAVs=25 | Galleys=20 | Main Cabin=18 | First Class=15 | Comfort Plus=12 | Other=10
N/A = excluded; weight redistributed proportionally across remaining items
Grey row = Aircraft name | total sections | total possible pts
LAV zones split equally (3 zones widebody / 1 zone regional)
Galley zones split equally (2 zones widebody / 1 zone regional)
